    net/rabbitmq-c: Update to 0.11.0

    - Update to 0.11.0

    And while here, also:
    - Rearrage Makefile to Porter's Handbooks guidelines
    - Remove unneeded Python dependency
    - Make static library options
    - Add support for "make test"

    PR:             256842
    Approved by:    dch (maintainer)
